protocols.name: Observer Foundation
protocols.description: Establishes the Observer perspective—the foundation of all Inversion Excursion work. Cultivates the capacity to witness experience without identification.
protocols.narrative_context: Use before entering the Ivory Tower. Establishes the perspective that credentials are costumes, not essence.

protocols.name: Third-Person Shift
protocols.description: Creates distance from identity claims by shifting to third-person perspective. Dissolves the grip of credentials and social masks.
protocols.narrative_context: Use when facing the Pedant or any credential challenge. The shift from 'I am' to '[Name] is' breaks identification.

protocols.name: Elemental Grounding
protocols.description: Sequential activation of all five elements through their associated frequencies. Establishes complete energetic foundation.
protocols.narrative_context: Use before attempting the five elemental concentrations. Each 5-minute segment corresponds to one element.

protocols.name: Fear Dissolution
protocols.description: Targets root chakra fear and survival anxiety. Combines 396 Hz (liberation from fear) with Schumann resonance for earthly grounding.
protocols.narrative_context: Use when facing the Golem or any financial threat. The lock grounds you below the level of abstraction where money operates.

protocols.name: Linguistic Clarity
protocols.description: Activates throat chakra for clear expression and elevated perspective above linguistic manipulation.
protocols.narrative_context: Use when facing the Polyglot Puppeteer or any linguistic trap. 'Flying up' gives perspective on the Tower.

protocols.name: Direct Access
protocols.description: Bypasses spiritual intermediaries through combined third-eye and crown activation. For direct experience without hierarchy.
protocols.narrative_context: Use when facing the Grand Inquisitor. The tongue position gives direct access to the nectar the Temple promises but cannot deliver.

protocols.name: Diamond Body
protocols.description: Cellular transformation through 528 Hz DNA repair frequency combined with Gamma for peak cognition. Embodied authority.
protocols.narrative_context: Use when facing the Alchemist of Inertia or making health decisions. Your body becomes the laboratory.

protocols.name: The Mint Protocol
protocols.description: Deep dungeon work for financial liberation. Combines root grounding with 174 Hz pain reduction for moving frozen financial energy.
protocols.narrative_context: Complete protocol for the Mint dungeon. Moving the Goddess dissolves what was frozen.

protocols.name: The Tower Protocol
protocols.description: Advanced linguistic analysis combining WYRD methodology with pattern recognition. For seeing through the Tower's confusion.
protocols.narrative_context: The full combination for the Puppeteer battle. Flying up plus throat seal = complete linguistic immunity.

protocols.name: The Temple Protocol
protocols.description: Complete inversion of spiritual intermediation. Combines inversion posture with crown activation for direct access.
protocols.narrative_context: Inverts the inversion. The Temple's teachings are already inverted; this inverts them again, returning to direct access.

protocols.name: The Laboratory Protocol
protocols.description: Embodied experimentation combining transformation frequency with earthly grounding. For treating the body as laboratory.
protocols.narrative_context: Master Key preview of Chapter 4. The body is the only laboratory that matters for your own consciousness.

protocols.name: 3 AM Anxiety
protocols.description: Emergency protocol for night waking and financial panic. Immediate root stabilization.
protocols.mantra: I am grounded. I am safe.
protocols.narrative_context: The 3 AM protocol. When the mind races with worst-case scenarios, return to the root.

protocols.name: Pre-Interview Shield
protocols.description: Protection protocol for credential challenges. Maintains truth despite institutional pressure.
protocols.narrative_context: The throat seal prevents your truth from falling into their digestive fire.

protocols.name: Post-Argument Reset
protocols.description: Clears linguistic residue and emotional charge from difficult conversations.
protocols.narrative_context: Words stick like burrs. Moving the Goddess shakes them loose.
